headline: BD (BDX) Receives Vizient Innovative Technology Contract for CentroVena One Insertion System
summary: Becton, Dickinson & Company (NYSE:BDX) is one of the best value stocks to buy right now. On June 23, BD (Becton, Dickinson & Company) announced that its CentroVena One Insertion System was awarded an Innovative Technology contract by Vizient, the nation’s largest provider-driven healthcare performance improvement company. This contract recognizes the system as a breakthrough […]
